connectors.name: BEE_2_RXD
connectors.description: Pin 2 on the bee slot is connected to Serial1 (RXD1). With a solder jumber this can be changed to Serial (RDX0)

connectors.name: BEE_3_TXD
connectors.description: Pin 3 on the bee slot is connected to Serial1 (TXD1). With a solder jumber this can be changed to Serial (TDX0)

connectors.name: BEE_4_NC
connectors.description: Pin 4 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_5_NC
connectors.description: Pin 5 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_6
connectors.description: Pin 6 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_7
connectors.description: Pin 7 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_8
connectors.description: Pin 8 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_9_DTR
connectors.description: Pin 9 on the bee slot is connected to D23 and is used as DTR pin to switch bee modules on and off or enable sleep

connectors.name: BEE_11_NC
connectors.description: Pin 11 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_12_CTS
connectors.description: Pin 12 on the bee slot is connected to D8 and is used as CTS pin to indicate if the bee module is ready

connectors.name: BEE_13_NC
connectors.description: Pin 13 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_14_NC
connectors.description: Pin 14 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_15_ASSOC
connectors.description: Pin 15 on the bee slot is normally not connected but by using solder jumper it can be used to connect to pin A7

connectors.name: BEE_16_RTS
connectors.description: Pin 16 on the bee slot is connected to D9 and can be used for the RTS signal

connectors.name: BEE_17_RESET
connectors.description: Pin 17 on the bee slot is normally not connected but can be connected to the MCU RESET pin by making solder jumper SJ7

connectors.name: BEE_18_NC
connectors.description: Pin 18 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_19_NC
connectors.description: Pin 19 on the bee slot is normally not connected

connectors.name: BEE_20_RI
connectors.description: Pin 20 on the bee slot is normally not connected but by using solder jumper it can be used to connect to pin A7 for the Ring Indicator signal

connectors.name: 3V3_SW
connectors.description: 3.3V switched power on when  D22 is high

connectors.name: JTAG_TCK
connectors.description: JTAG TCK connects to pin D18 on the MCU

connectors.description: JTAG TDO connects to pin D20 on the MCU

connectors.description: JTAG TMS connects to pin D19 on the MCU

connectors.description: JTAG TD1 connects to pin D21 on the MCU

connectors.name: JP_BAT2
connectors.description: This jumper needs to be installed when running on battery. Can be removed to measure the current.

connectors.name: JP_BAT1
connectors.description: This jumper needs to be installed when running on battery. Can be removed to measure the current.

connectors.name: SW_1
connectors.description: This socket is to allow for external power switch. To use this put onboard switch in off positio

connectors.name: SW_2
connectors.description: This socket is to allow for external power switch. To use this put onboard switch in off position

connectors.name: V_BAT
connectors.description: Connects to Litium Polymer (LiPo) batteries with nominal voltage of 3.7V

connectors.name: V_SOLAR
connectors.description: Max voltage 6V and max panel size 3W
